Class Game

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Game
All Implemented Interfaces:
GameView, MementoManager<GameMemento>
public class Game extends Object implements GameView, MementoManager<GameMemento>
Core game model for a Mesos session. Manages the board, market, turn order, era progression, and all game-phase transitions from setup through end-game. Notifies registered GameObservers on every state change.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Game(int playerNumber)
    constructor for loading game
    Game(Player playerHost, int playerNumber)
    default constructor of game, this method when called creates the deck and the buildings by launching the factories.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addObserver(GameObserver observerToAdd)
    Subscribes an observer to game-state changes.

    this method tries to add a player, in case the lobby is already full it does nothing.
    void
    advancePlayingPhase()
    Transitions the game from the placing phase to the playing (resolve-action) phase.
    boolean
    canCurrentPlayingPlayerDoSomething()
    Checks whether the current playing player has at least one legal market action.
    List<Player>
    checkWinner()
    Determines the winner(s) at game end and notifies all observers.
    GameMemento
    createMemento()
    Creates a memento capturing the entire current game state: era, game phase, number of players, the current placing player, the current action player, every player's state, the market state, and the board state.
    void
    endGameIter()
    applies the building effect if any of the players has at least one in their tribe solves the final events and the other events if there are any other manages the prestige points by checking the tribe each of the players have
    void
    forceAdvancePlacing()
    Advances the placing turn without an actual totem placement, used when the current placing player has disconnected.
    void
    gameStart()
    this method sets up the game after it is full: - it randomly place players on a default tile - it sets the game to the next phase, it notifies the player updating the views

    getBoard()
    Returns the board instance for this game.

    Returns the current era of the game.

    Returns the current game phase.

    Returns the market instance for this game.

    Returns the offer tile the current playing player is on (snapshot copy).

    Returns the list of all players in this game.

    Returns the total number of players in this game.

    Returns the player whose turn it is to place during the placing phase.
    Player

    Returns the player whose turn it is to resolve actions during the playing phase.
    Player

    Returns the model Player instance that matches the given player's nickname.
    void
    goNextPlayingPlayer()
    Advances the game turn to the next playing player.
    void
    linkObserver(ServerVirtualView vv)
    Registers a ServerVirtualView as an observer of the game, board, and market, so it receives all state-change notifications.
    void
    nextEra()
    Advances the game to the next era.
    void
    nextRoundIter()
    Triggers all end-of-round actions: moves players back to default tiles, triggers end-round buildings, and advances the market (shifting card lists and refilling them).
    void
    notifyAllPlayerTribes()
    Re-fires notifyCardAddedToTribe for every card in every player's tribe.
    void
    notifyChanges()
    Re-fires the full market and board state to all observers.
    void
    notifyCurrentState()
    Pushes the current era, game phase, and active turn info to all observers.
    void
    placePlayer(Player player, int position)
    Places a player on an offer tile during the placing phase.
    void
    reAddToTurnQueues(Player player)
    Re-adds a reconnected player to the end of both turn queues.
    void
    removeFromTurnQueues(Player player)
    Removes the given player from both the placing and playing turn queues immediately.
    void
    removeObserver(GameObserver observerToRemove)
    Unsubscribes an observer from game-state changes.
    void
    restoreMemento(GameMemento memento)
    Restores the game from the serialised state stored in the provided memento.
    void
    selectExtraCardFromTopList(CARD_TYPE cardType, int position, Player player)
    Draws one extra card from the top market row for the given player without touching the offer-tile action counter.
    void
    selectGenericCardBottomLists(CARD_TYPE toBuyCardType, int position, Player player)
    Selects a card from the bottom list and adds it to the player, then decrements the player's remaining bottom-draw actions.

    selectGenericCardTopLists(CARD_TYPE toBuyCardType, int position, Player player)
    this method adds a card from the top list
    void
    skipDisconnectedPlacingPlayer()
    Advances the placing phase to the next connected player without placing a totem.

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(Player playerHost, int playerNumber)
      default constructor of game, this method when called creates the deck and the buildings by launching the factories.
      Parameters:
      playerHost - player who created the game
      playerNumber - number of players

    • Game

      public Game(int playerNumber)
      constructor for loading game
      Parameters:
      playerNumber - number of players

  • Method Details

    • getGamePhase

      public GAME_PHASE getGamePhase()
      Returns the current game phase.
      Returns:
      the current GAME_PHASE

    • addPlayer

      public void addPlayer(Player player) throws GameReadyToStartException
      this method tries to add a player, in case the lobby is already full it does nothing. in case, after adding the player, the lobby is ready it launches the gameReadyToStartException
      Parameters:
      player - player to add
      Throws:
      GameReadyToStartException - exception thrown when the lobby gets full after adding the player

    • gameStart

      public void gameStart()
      this method sets up the game after it is full: - it randomly place players on a default tile - it sets the game to the next phase, it notifies the player updating the views

    • placePlayer

      public void placePlayer(Player player, int position) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException, TileOccupiedException, EndOfPlacingPhaseException
      Places a player on an offer tile during the placing phase. If all players have already placed, it signals the end of placing phase.
      Parameters:
      player - player to place
      position - target offer-tile index
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the position is not valid
      TileOccupiedException - if the target tile is already occupied
      EndOfPlacingPhaseException

    • forceAdvancePlacing

      public void forceAdvancePlacing()
      Advances the placing turn without an actual totem placement, used when the current placing player has disconnected. Mirrors the tail of placePlayer(Player, int) after a successful placement.

    • advancePlayingPhase

      public void advancePlayingPhase()
      Transitions the game from the placing phase to the playing (resolve-action) phase. Updates the playing order, sets the first player to play, and — if that player is on offer tile 'A' (no actions, only food) — automatically advances to the next player.

    • checkWinner

      public List<Player> checkWinner()
      Determines the winner(s) at game end and notifies all observers. Returns a single player when there is a clear prestige-point leader, a single player when prestige points are tied but one has more food, or multiple players when both prestige points and food are equal.
      Returns:
      the list of winning players (one or more).

    • nextRoundIter

      public void nextRoundIter() throws EndGameException
      Triggers all end-of-round actions: moves players back to default tiles, triggers end-round buildings, and advances the market (shifting card lists and refilling them). If the deck is exhausted the game phase transitions to GAME_PHASE.END_GAME. If the game is already in END_GAME, delegates to endGameIter().
      Throws:
      EndGameException - when the game is finished

    • endGameIter

      public void endGameIter()
      applies the building effect if any of the players has at least one in their tribe solves the final events and the other events if there are any other manages the prestige points by checking the tribe each of the players have

    • selectGenericCardTopLists

      public void selectGenericCardTopLists(CARD_TYPE toBuyCardType, int position, Player player) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException, NotSelectableCardException, NotEnoughFoodException, EmptyMarketException, NoMoreActionToDo
      this method adds a card from the top list
      Parameters:
      toBuyCardType - cardType to buy
      position - position of the card
      player - player buying the card
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - in case the position is not valid
      NotEnoughFoodException - in case the player does not have enough food
      NotSelectableCardException - if the player tries to select an event card
      NoMoreActionToDo - if the player has no remaining actions after this selection
      EmptyMarketException

    • selectExtraCardFromTopList

      public void selectExtraCardFromTopList(CARD_TYPE cardType, int position, Player player) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException, NotSelectableCardException, NotEnoughFoodException, EmptyMarketException
      Draws one extra card from the top market row for the given player without touching the offer-tile action counter. Used exclusively by the draw-one-more building effect.
      Parameters:
      cardType - type of card to draw
      position - index in the top row
      player - the player who owns the building
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if position is out of range
      NotSelectableCardException - if the card at that position is an event
      NotEnoughFoodException - if the player cannot afford a building
      EmptyMarketException - if the top row has no selectable cards

    • canCurrentPlayingPlayerDoSomething

      public boolean canCurrentPlayingPlayerDoSomething()
      Checks whether the current playing player has at least one legal market action.
      Returns:
      true if the player can draw from at least one non-blocked market row; false if both rows are empty or contain only events, or the player has no remaining draws.

    • selectGenericCardBottomLists

      public void selectGenericCardBottomLists(CARD_TYPE toBuyCardType, int position, Player player) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException, NotSelectableCardException, NotEnoughFoodException, EmptyMarketException, NoMoreActionToDo
      Selects a card from the bottom list and adds it to the player, then decrements the player's remaining bottom-draw actions. When all actions are exhausted the turn automatically advances to the next player.
      Parameters:
      toBuyCardType - cardType to buy
      position - position of the card in the bottom list
      player - player buying the card
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - in case the position is not valid
      NotEnoughFoodException - in case the player does not have enough food
      NotSelectableCardException - if the player tries to select an event card
      EmptyMarketException
      NoMoreActionToDo

    • goNextPlayingPlayer

      public void goNextPlayingPlayer() throws EndOfPlayingPhaseException
      Advances the game turn to the next playing player. Updates playerToPlay and refreshes the tile the player is on.
      Throws:
      EndOfPlayingPhaseException - if there are no more players left to play this round

    • getOffertilePlayerIsOn

      public OfferTile getOffertilePlayerIsOn()
      Returns the offer tile the current playing player is on (snapshot copy).
      Returns:
      the OfferTile the current player is on

    • getPlayerToPlace

      public Player getPlayerToPlace()
      Returns the player whose turn it is to place during the placing phase.
      Returns:
      the player to place

    • getPlayerToPlay

      public Player getPlayerToPlay()
      Returns the player whose turn it is to resolve actions during the playing phase.
      Returns:
      the player to play

    • getMarket

      public Market getMarket()
      Returns the market instance for this game.
      Returns:
      the Market

    • getBoard

      public Board getBoard()
      Returns the board instance for this game.
      Returns:
      the Board

    • addObserver

      public void addObserver(GameObserver observerToAdd)
      Subscribes an observer to game-state changes.
      Parameters:
      observerToAdd - observer to subscribe; ignored if null or already subscribed

    • removeObserver

      public void removeObserver(GameObserver observerToRemove)
      Unsubscribes an observer from game-state changes.
      Parameters:
      observerToRemove - observer to unsubscribe

    • getPlayerNumber

      public int getPlayerNumber()
      Returns the total number of players in this game.
      Specified by:
      getPlayerNumber in interface GameView
      Returns:
      number of players

    • getCurrentEra

      public ERA getCurrentEra()
      Returns the current era of the game.
      Specified by:
      getCurrentEra in interface GameView
      Returns:
      the current ERA

    • getPlayerList

      public List<Player> getPlayerList()
      Returns the list of all players in this game.
      Specified by:
      getPlayerList in interface GameView
      Returns:
      list of players

    • getSpecificPlayer

      public Player getSpecificPlayer(Player player)
      Returns the model Player instance that matches the given player's nickname.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose nickname is used for the lookup.
      Returns:
      the matching Player, or null if not found.

    • nextEra

      public void nextEra()
      Advances the game to the next era. If the current era is already the last one, the era is left unchanged.
      Specified by:
      nextEra in interface GameView

    • linkObserver

      public void linkObserver(ServerVirtualView vv)
      Registers a ServerVirtualView as an observer of the game, board, and market, so it receives all state-change notifications.
      Parameters:
      vv - the virtual view to register.

    • notifyChanges

      public void notifyChanges()
      Re-fires the full market and board state to all observers. Used when resuming a loaded game so every client gets an up-to-date snapshot.

    • notifyAllPlayerTribes

      public void notifyAllPlayerTribes()
      Re-fires notifyCardAddedToTribe for every card in every player's tribe. Used when resuming a saved game so all clients receive the full tribe state.

    • notifyCurrentState

      public void notifyCurrentState()
      Pushes the current era, game phase, and active turn info to all observers. Used when resuming a loaded game after all players have reconnected.

    • removeFromTurnQueues

      public void removeFromTurnQueues(Player player)
      Removes the given player from both the placing and playing turn queues immediately. Called when a player disconnects so the game never waits for them.
      Parameters:
      player - the disconnected player.

    • reAddToTurnQueues

      public void reAddToTurnQueues(Player player)
      Re-adds a reconnected player to the end of both turn queues.
      Parameters:
      player - the reconnected player.

    • skipDisconnectedPlacingPlayer

      public void skipDisconnectedPlacingPlayer() throws EndOfPlacingPhaseException
      Advances the placing phase to the next connected player without placing a totem. Used when the current placing player has disconnected mid-phase.
      Throws:
      EndOfPlacingPhaseException - if no more connected players need to place.

    • createMemento

      public GameMemento createMemento()
      Creates a memento capturing the entire current game state: era, game phase, number of players, the current placing player, the current action player, every player's state, the market state, and the board state.
      Specified by:
      createMemento in interface MementoManager<GameMemento>
      Returns:
      a GameMemento representing the complete game snapshot.

    • restoreMemento

      public void restoreMemento(GameMemento memento)
      Restores the game from the serialised state stored in the provided memento. Recreates players with their tribe and buildings, restores the market and board, repositions players on default tiles, and realigns the turn queues.
      Specified by:
      restoreMemento in interface MementoManager<GameMemento>
      Parameters:
      memento - the GameMemento from which to restore the game state.
